summary: Decision: adopt canary as the default serving rollout strategy
description: Proposal to make canary rollouts, as designed with the ramp scheduler shipped in HEL-345, the default deploy path for serving, replacing blue-green. Blue-green gave a clean cutover but no gradual exposure, and HEL-112 is one of several incidents where that cost us.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: In favor. The ramp scheduler and automatic regression abort from HEL-345 make canary safe to default to now, that gap is what made blue-green the safer default before.

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: Also in favor from the SRE side, canary rollback is just setting weight to zero, simpler than the blue-green flip procedure operationally.

comments.author: Maya Okafor
comments.body: Decision accepted: canary is now the default rollout strategy. Owen is documenting the new process, blue-green tooling stays available but deprecated. Resolving.
